title: Vitamix 5200
description:
This has been my well-loved machine for 15 years and has made countless smoothies, soups, and meals along the way. It’s still strong and reliable in many ways, but it’s not perfect.

The speed control no longer works properly and it runs at one speed (maximum). The High and variable speed dial are working without any issues. 

I’m not looking to send it off to a random donation pile. I’d really love for it to go to someone who appreciates Vitamix machines and is happy to keep using it, repair it, or give it a thoughtful second life.
